calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-29-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue Kaplan; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Sara Lerschen. Petitioner Simon Almendares-Ruiz was represented by Golnar Yazdi, Esq. Petitioner was sworn and examined. The Court grants decree changing name to Simon Almendares-Berman. Decree signed in open court.
